data.title: Orchid Island Capital Announces April 2026 Monthly Dividend, Estimated First Quarter 2026 Results and March 31, 2026 RMBS Portfolio Characteristics
data.description: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. (NYSE: ORC) based in Vero Beach, Florida, has reported that its Board of Directors approved a monthly cash dividend for April 2026. Shareholders of the company will receive $0.10 per share on May 28, 2026. To be eligible for this dividend, investors must be recorded as holders of the Company's common stock by April 30, 2026, with an ex-dividend date set also on April 30, 2026. The next common stock dividend announcement by Orchid Island Capital, Inc. is scheduled for May 13, 2026.

data.title: Constellation Software Inc. Announces Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter Results
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Constellation Software Inc. (TSX:CSU) shared details of its plans to conduct a conference call and live audio webcast for the first quarter on May 13, 2026, starting at 8:00 a.m. ET. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during the initial months of the year.

data.title: JB Hunt Earnings Growth Accelerates On First Sales Gain Since 2022
data.description: The latest earnings report from a prominent trucking company has raised optimism for a rebound in the crucial intermodal sector. JB Hunt's earnings growth has seen a significant acceleration with its first sales increase since 2022. This development has sparked interest among investors, signaling a potential upturn in the industry.

data.title: Battalion Oil Reports Record Well Results and Increased Gas Throughput Under Previously Announced Midstream Agreement
data.description: Battalion Oil has announced excellent well outcomes along with a significant 20% rise in gas flow after finishing projects under its midstream deal. This achievement marks a remarkable milestone for the company as it has recorded its highest-ever well performance. Additionally, the 20% surge in gas throughput signifies a substantial increase in production and revenue generation. It showcases the successful execution of projects outlined in Battalion Oil's midstream agreement, highlighting the company's commitment to enhancing operational efficiency and maximizing output.

data.title: NextNRG Reports Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Revenue has surged by 195% year over year, reaching a total of $81.8 million.

data.title: Linamar Maintains 2026 Outlook
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 15, 2026, headquartered in Guelph, Ontario, Linamar Corporation (TSX:LNR) stated that it will uphold its full-year FY26 guidance amid the adjustment of Section 232 tariffs. The company remains confident in its financial projections and strategic outlook despite the changes in the trade regulations.

data.title: Westport Provides Bi-Weekly Management Cease Trade Order Status Update
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 15, 2026, Westport Fuel Systems Inc. (referred to as "Westport" or the "Company") provided a bi-weekly update on the status of the management cease trade order, as required by National Policy 12-203 - Management Cease Trade Orders. Westport's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol WPRT and on the Nasdaq under the same symbol.

data.title: Skild AI Acquires Zebra Technologies' Robotics Automation Business
data.description: Skild AI has recently completed the acquisition of Zebra Technologies' Robotics Automation unit, which consists of the Symmetry Fulfillment orchestration platform. This move signifies a significant step for Skild AI in expanding its capabilities, particularly with the Skild Brain - an innovative omnibodied AI software that can operate various robots without prior knowledge of their specific body structure. This cutting-edge technology allows for seamless control of robots in any warehouse setting, across different tasks. With the integration of Zebra's trusted Symmetry orchestration platform, Skild AI is now equipped with the necessary infrastructure to efficiently deploy and orchestrate these operations.

data.title: Ketjen Announces New Chief Executive Officer to Lead Ketjen’s Next Growth Phase
data.description: In Houston, Ketjen Corporation, a prominent catalyst and specialty chemicals innovator, disclosed the appointment of André Lanning as the new Chief Executive Officer, taking over from retiring CEO Michael J. Simmons. Lanning will lead Ketjen into its upcoming phase of expansion and advancement. In his role as CEO, Lanning will concentrate on hastening Ketjen's strategic objectives, ensuring ongoing operational success, and providing top-tier solutions, services, and quality to customers.

data.title: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Real estate company Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) revealed it will report its Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, 2026, after NYSE trading hours. A conference call and webcast to review the financial results are scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Further details for the call and webcast are available on the company's website at https://www.fbrtr.

data.title: GNQ Insilico Plans to Accelerate Precision Medicine and Clinical AI Adoption Across Drug Development and Patient Care
data.description: Today, GNQ Insilico, Inc. revealed a partnership with IBM in San Jose, California. GNQ, a precision medicine TechBio company, will work with IBM to advance personalized, data-driven medicine in healthcare and life sciences. This collaboration will involve GNQ providing its causal AI Drug Assessment, Drug Simulation, and Digital Twin platforms, with backing from IBM's consulting prowess and hybrid cloud deployment knowledge. This partnership marks a significant step in integrating advanced technologies into the medical field.

data.title: Covalon Technologies Reports Significant Milestones Spanning Vascular Access, Infection Prevention, and Wound Care
data.description: In Ontario, Covalon Technologies Ltd revealed significant progress, indicating market growth and commercial success. The company, specializing in advanced medical technologies, highlighted key milestones in vascular access, infection prevention, and wound care sectors. At the Infusion Nurses Society (INS) Annual Meeting, Covalon exhibited robust participation, showcasing its deepening involvement and commercial traction. Notably listed on the TSX as COV and OTCQX as CVALF, the company's strategic advancements underscore its flourishing presence in the industry.

data.title: S&P 500 reaches new high post Iran war fears, closing over 7,000 amid investor optimism.
data.description: Investors seem to be factoring in the resolution of the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran, given the S&P 500 closing above the 7,000 mark.
